calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: P2 ROOT-C de-commit science falsifier: MECH-445 commit-intent + MECH-446 occupancy-drop co-occurrence on validated use_closure_commit_entry substrate (supersedes parked 460k/460l)
items.note: OWED P2 ROOT-C de-commit SCIENCE falsifier (conversion_ceiling_campaign:P2-rootC). Re-derive brake (5 prior substrate_ceiling autopsies 460h..460l on MECH-445/446) RELEASED: named upstream substrate f_dominance_conversion_ceiling root-C closure-coupled-hold arming now BUILT+VALIDATED via use_closure_commit_entry (460o/p PASS 2026-06-24; substrate_queue build_record_460k_460l_commit_entry next). SUPERSEDES the PARKED 460k (rung-6 duration lever) / 460l (ARC-108 driver pair) line -- do NOT re-author 460d..460l; both parked levers OFF, de-commit under test is the intrinsic SD-034 closure refractory. Tests MECH-445 commit-intent + MECH-446 within-arm occupancy-drop CO-OCCURRENCE on the F-independent occupancy (dissolves the 460h disjoint-certifier problem). Readiness unmet -> substrate_not_ready_requeue (never a false weakens). PROMOTES NOTHING. Mint: multi-arm arm_cell emits the ENTRY_OFF baseline reuse-eligible in-run (mint-as-you-go); NO separate baseline mint -- the OFF arm is a cheap eval-clone of the per-seed trained curriculum, not a separately-trained baseline, and the 460 lineage substrate is in flux (disqualifier #2/#3). Queued via coordinator POST (Phase-3 authoritative) because a concurrent session held an uncommitted V3-EXQ-714 edit in the shared working-tree queue file (Step-5 STOP: queue-file commit would sweep foreign work).
items.machine_affinity_note: cloud preferred (yield logic routes cloud workers ahead of the Mac); heavy full-curriculum x3 seeds ~3h CPU. Avoid the Mac for this run.
